reason_de: Separater Ingest-Vertrag implementiert und getestet (DCC blockiert, /api/rescue/telemetry erlaubt). Nächster Schritt: Operator aktiviert RESCUE_TELEMETRY_INGEST_ENABLED=1 am laufenden Backend (Restart-Freigabe) und führt Live-Smoke aus.
reason_en: Separate ingest contract implemented and tested (DCC blocked, /api/rescue/telemetry allowed). Next: operator enables RESCUE_TELEMETRY_INGEST_ENABLED=1 on running backend (restart approval) and runs live smoke.

tracks.next_step: RESCUE_TELEMETRY_INGEST_OPERATOR_SMOKE — env + systemd drop-in oder Restart-Freigabe.

governance_rules.selection_rule: Telemetry ingest code complete; live smoke requires operator env + backend restart approval.
